comment: Cross-adapter parity contract between @stll/folio-react and @stll/folio-vue. Drives `bun run check:parity-contract`, which parses each adapter's `DocxEditorProps` / `DocxEditorRef` from source and applies this contract, failing on any undocumented drift. `paired` = present and functional in both adapters. `deferredInVue` = declared in the Vue `DocxEditorProps` / `DocxEditorRef` type (so the type surface stays parity-complete and `satisfies DocxEditorRef` holds), but the Vue implementation does not wire it yet — DocxEditor.vue ignores the prop, or useDocxEditorRefApi.ts stubs the method to a constant. Each deferred entry has a one-line reason. Adding a prop/method to either adapter without classifying it here fails the gate.

deferredInVue.anonymizationSelectionSeq: Anonymization decoration overlay is not ported to Vue; the re-scroll counter is ignored.
deferredInVue.autoOpenReviewSidebar: Review-sidebar auto-open is not wired in DocxEditor.vue; the sidebar stays user-toggled.
deferredInVue.collaboration: Yjs collaboration owner is not threaded through the Vue pipeline yet.
deferredInVue.components: Consumer UI-injection map (FolioUIComponents) is not consumed by the Vue chrome yet.
deferredInVue.customContextMenuItems: The right-click menu is wired (useContextMenus), but host-injected menu items are not appended to it.
deferredInVue.featureFlags: Selective-save feature flags are not plumbed into the Vue save path.
deferredInVue.fonts: Host FontFace registration is not ported; custom faces are not injected.
deferredInVue.initialScrollTop: Initial scroll offset is not applied by the Vue scroll container.
deferredInVue.loadingIndicator: Vue renders a fixed 'Loading...' shell instead of the custom slot/node.
deferredInVue.marginGuideColor: Pairs with showMarginGuides; margin-guide overlay is not ported.
deferredInVue.onAnonymizationMatchesChange: Anonymization decoration overlay is not ported to Vue.
deferredInVue.onAnonymizationTermClick: Anonymization decoration overlay is not ported to Vue.
deferredInVue.onCompatibilityChange: Parsed-document compatibility report is not surfaced by the Vue shell.
deferredInVue.onCopy: Clipboard event hooks are intentionally not wired (React leaves onCopy/onCut/onPaste unused too); the context menu drives clipboard via execCommand.
deferredInVue.onCustomContextAction: Pairs with customContextMenuItems; the wired context menu does not append host items yet.
deferredInVue.onCut: Clipboard event hooks are intentionally not wired (React leaves onCopy/onCut/onPaste unused too); the context menu drives clipboard via execCommand.
deferredInVue.onFontsLoaded: Font-load lifecycle is not surfaced in Vue.
deferredInVue.onPaste: Clipboard event hooks are intentionally not wired (React leaves onCopy/onCut/onPaste unused too); the context menu drives clipboard via execCommand.
deferredInVue.onScrollTopChange: Scroll-offset callback is not emitted by the Vue scroll container.
deferredInVue.onSelectionTextChange: Selection plain-text callback is not emitted by the Vue shell.
deferredInVue.onSelectiveSaveTripwire: Selective-save tripwire observability is not plumbed into the Vue save path.
deferredInVue.onSlashMenuChange: Template slash-menu plugin is not ported to Vue.
deferredInVue.onSlashMenuKeyAction: Template slash-menu plugin is not ported to Vue.
deferredInVue.placeholder: Empty-state slot/node is not rendered by the Vue shell.
deferredInVue.preserveDocumentWhileLoading: Keep-previous-document-while-loading behavior is not implemented in Vue.
deferredInVue.rulerUnit: Rulers are not ported to Vue; the unit toggle has no effect.
deferredInVue.selectedAnonymizationCanonical: Anonymization decoration overlay is not ported to Vue.
deferredInVue.showHeaderFooterEditing: Header/footer inline editing is not ported to Vue.
deferredInVue.showMarginGuides: Margin-guide overlay is not ported to Vue.
deferredInVue.showPrintButton: Toolbar print-button visibility flag is not consumed; print lives on the menu bar.
deferredInVue.showReviewControls: Review controls (track-changes toggle, markup mode) are not ported to the Vue toolbar.
deferredInVue.showRuler: Rulers are not ported to Vue.
deferredInVue.showTemplateDirectives: Template-directive widgets are not ported to Vue.
deferredInVue.toolbarExtra: Vue exposes extra toolbar content via the #toolbar-extra slot instead of the prop.

ref.comment: DocxEditorRef parity. Both adapters declare an identical DocxEditorRef type surface (Vue's assembled object `satisfies DocxEditorRef`). `paired` members have a real implementation in useDocxEditorRefApi.ts; `deferredInVue` members are stubbed to a constant (null / false / [] / no-op) with a PORT-BLOCKED note in that file, pending the backing composable/component.

deferredInVue.acceptAIEditOperation: AI-edit surface is not ported; stubbed to return false.
deferredInVue.applyAIEditOperations: AI-edit surface is not ported; stubbed to an empty apply result.
deferredInVue.createAIEditSnapshot: AI-edit surface is not ported; stubbed to return null.
deferredInVue.getContentControls: Content-control ref methods need transaction wrappers over folio-core/content-controls; stubbed to [].
deferredInVue.getEditorRef: Requires the Vue PagedEditor component, not ported; stubbed to return null.
deferredInVue.hasPendingChanges: Requires PM-serialized-vs-live tracking the Vue pipeline does not surface; stubbed to false.
deferredInVue.rejectAIEditOperation: AI-edit surface is not ported; stubbed to return false.
deferredInVue.removeContentControl: Content-control mutation is not ported; stubbed to return false.
deferredInVue.scrollToAIEditOperation: AI-edit surface is not ported; stubbed to return false.
deferredInVue.scrollToBlock: Block-scroll navigation is not ported; stubbed to return false.
deferredInVue.scrollToContentControl: Content-control navigation is not ported; stubbed to return false.
deferredInVue.setContentControlContent: Content-control mutation is not ported; stubbed to return false.
deferredInVue.setContentControlValue: Content-control mutation is not ported; stubbed to return false.
